types/WrapperDescriptorType.name: WrapperDescriptorType
types/WrapperDescriptorType.description: The type of methods of some built-in data types and base classes such as object.__init__() or object.__lt__(). Added in version 3.7.

info.excerpt: The type of methods of some built-in data types and base classes such as object.__init__() or object.__lt__(). Added in version 3.7.
